section_miscategorizations.text: I will also continue the patient on gabapentin
section_miscategorizations.reason: This sentence mixes a treatment decision (appropriate for Plan) with a medication that is also documented as a current medication in S. The action of continuing therapy belongs in P, but ideally the note would clearly distinguish between current use (S) and the decision to continue (P). This is a minor organizational issue and not a true miscategorization of the statement's primary intent.
